disclaimer: Adapter mapping external search/planning compression tasks onto DESi's measured branch metrics. Compression cleanly distinguishes four mechanisms - hard pruning, soft reweighting, replay reuse and redundant-branch compression - and uses only the lossless and reversible ones. Critical (load-bearing) branches are always kept and visible and are never hard-pruned, so the search space shrinks without hiding any load-bearing branch. The node counts are a deterministic synthetic search space, not a live planner trace. Human approval is mandatory.
